action.reasoning: Observation: Best test AP still 0.1633 (from early iter), latest larger MLP (1024-dim/4-layer) gave worse 0.1536 with val plateau ~0.164; train.py file truncated at batch loop (risks runtime errors), no metrics.jsonl written. Analysis: Over-capacity model overfits on Morgan FP (val AP drops on test); PyG still unusable due to persistent segfaults on imports. Smaller stable arch (512-dim, 3-layer, low dropout), complete non-truncated train.py with per-epoch jsonl logging, grad clipping, robust masked BCE, ReduceLROnPlateau(patience=5), 100 epochs will recover and improve without recomputing caches. Decision: Update model.py (new defaults), fully rewrite complete train.py + predict.py (match arch, nan safety), train then submit_eval on best.pt for higher avg_precision.
